expand_md_result: clean — all 3 markers resolved: ae101-m3-sharpen-skill, ae101-m3-ready-to-clear, ae101-m3-clear-session

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Training platform = Claude Code (CLI + Desktop).
Verify capabilities BEFORE asserting.
rules_evaluated.notes: Platform claims verified against training-architecture.md and check_platform_and_boundaries compendium. No unverified assertions found.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Auto-load is filename-based, not folder-based.
rules_evaluated.notes: CLAUDE.local.md auto-loads as a valid filename-based surface. ~/.claude/skills/ auto-discovery is correct platform behavior for skills. No false auto-load claims in student-facing body.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Sessions are the unit of work.
rules_evaluated.notes: Module uses 'same session' and 'Module 4 opens a new one' — consistent with session-boundary rules.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Cross-working-directory boundaries always open new.
rules_evaluated.notes: Module ends with /clear; next module opens new session. No cross-cwd ambiguity.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No as-is imports from the internet.
rules_evaluated.notes: Curated skills (access-control-analysis, stride) ship in content/skills/ — internal artifacts, not imported raw from internet.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Source URL + type label mandatory; maintainer-block scope only.
rules_evaluated.notes: No source-type labels in student-facing body. Frameworks section in maintainer block attributes practitioners without load-bearing URLs or numbers — check_research_claims §11 threshold not met.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Freshness rule — 6 months.
rules_evaluated.notes: TODO (non-blocking): Willison pre-read link dated 2025-Jun-16 (~11 months before 2026-05-14). This is a recommended pre-read, not a citation supporting a load-bearing claim. §2 scope is citations; pre-read links are not citations. Maintainer should verify article remains best primer before first cohort.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Zombie stat guard.
rules_evaluated.notes: No round-number AI failure/success rates cited.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Source-verification maintainer block on student-facing files with practitioner citations.
rules_evaluated.notes: Maintainer Frameworks section names practitioners (Klaassen, Shostack, Beck) without load-bearing URLs or specific numbers. Rule 11 threshold (named practitioner + specific URL + load-bearing number) not met.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No placeholders inside fenced blocks.
rules_evaluated.notes: All three expanded prompt fences scanned — no [BRACKETS] placeholders found.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Every prompt block gets a one-sentence action lead-in.
rules_evaluated.notes: All three prompts have action lead-in sentences. ae101-m3-clear-session is /clear — self-describing, body context covers it.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Installed Claude Code Skills invoke by name, never by path.
rules_evaluated.notes: content/skills/ path references appear only in maintainer block (Frameworks riffed on section), not inside any fenced prompt block. Student-facing body invokes skills by name only.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No markdown bold/italic inside fenced prompt blocks.
Preamble before action — design around it.
rules_evaluated.notes: ae101-m3-sharpen-skill has 2 main task blocks (not 4+ named sub-steps); structural trigger not met. Quality block logs 'preamble-before-action downgraded to low via body-callout carve-out' — maintainer-accepted pre-existing finding.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Prompts live in the registry; module files reference by marker.
rules_evaluated.notes: All 3 markers resolve cleanly. Registry keys verified: ae101-m3-sharpen-skill, ae101-m3-ready-to-clear, ae101-m3-clear-session.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No module-name references in prompt prose.
rules_evaluated.notes: ae101-m3-sharpen-skill references artifacts by description ('the access-control output, the STRIDE decision and ADR') — no bare M-number prose.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Artifact-realism check — named skills must exist and be installed.
rules_evaluated.notes: access-control-analysis and stride both exist at content/skills/ (tarball) and ~/.claude/skills/ (installed). test-strategy skill is AUTHORED during this module — not a pre-existing requirement.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Forcing functions live in prompts, not body prose.
rules_evaluated.notes: Module-level forcing functions (sharpen, clear) are fenced. Per-exercise forcing functions are in exercise files. Module body callouts for optional refinements are correctly loose per the carve-out.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Verification machinery needs a smoke-test before being trusted.
rules_evaluated.notes: The test-strategy skill authoring is followed immediately by an invocation step on the feature — the invocation IS the smoke-test.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Context-loading tiers as staged progression.
rules_evaluated.notes: CLAUDE.local.md (auto-load tier) and ~/.claude/skills/ (lazy-load/auto-discovery tier) claims match platform reality per check_platform_and_boundaries §6d.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Per-exercise leap test — three observable Monday-morning outcomes.
rules_evaluated.notes: Leap test present in maintainer block with 3 falsifiable outcomes. All name observable working-session behaviors with explicit falsifiability criteria.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Cross-module artefact contracts in maintainer block.
rules_evaluated.notes: Artefact contracts table present with stable identifiers, producing prompts, and consuming modules for ADR, test-strategy skill, and CLAUDE.local.md.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Per-phase failure mode + escape hatch for every forcing function.
rules_evaluated.notes: Per-phase failure mode + escape hatch table present covering all 6 forcing functions.
